data.body:
Epic 5ca8 (Codebase-health remediation — 2026-06-27 audit) — session checkpoint + resume guide (2026-06-28)

EPIC: 5ca8-5993-ca83-40f1 (in_progress).

SHIPPED + CLOSED THIS SESSION (all merged to origin/main + completion-verifier PASS-signed):
- 91e7 drag-gripe-brake (PR #77): enforceable/testable contracts at the LLM-workflow stage seams (kill the silent-degrade class). EXPAND-CONTRACT posture (user-directed): prod outcomes UNCHANGED; only additive observability (ERROR log + verdict-coverage `verification_contract_violations` count, present only when >0 so clean verdicts stay byte-identical/attestation-safe). Shared `review_kernel.reshape_verifications` replaces the duplicated silent-drop (kernel verify_findings + workflow plan_review_decide); strict `verification_model(strict=True)` (extra=forbid) test-pinned, flip-ready; `resolve_code_root(require=)` lever; module-size structural test `tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py` (caught + removed a stale `</content>` line in the allowlist). ADR docs/adr/0006.
- b2bb evil-noble-soil (PR #78): doubled DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS 25→50 (discovered_from the epic). Fixes the routine INDETERMINATE plan-review flake (the bare agentic verifier `plan-review-verifier-agentic` exceeded 25 steps). Floors (_REVIEW_MIN_STEPS=120/_VERIFY_MIN_STEPS=240) unchanged. So plan-reviews no longer need REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS overrides.
- c38b tarry-creep-range (PR #79): one atomic os.replace writer + ONE permissive case-insensitive id rule for prompt authoring (prompt_library._write → prompt_authoring._atomic_write; _validate_id → _valid_id). User-approved the PERMISSIVE [A-Za-z0-9-] rule (uppercase ids like plan-review-A1 are real → overrides must be authorable).
- 586c veiny-trout-brink (PR #80): resolve the gate LLMConfig ONCE at the run boundary, threaded via a run-scoped ContextVar (`config.gate_config`/`resolve_gate_config`) — NOT workflow inputs (the ProductionBatchRunner is not a workflow step), mirroring the existing read-root ContextVars; keeps StepContext config-agnostic. Verdict model/runner now honor an explicit caller config.
- ff7d romp-swath-wince (PR #81): unified the two divergent RetryExhaustedError + the JiraAPIError into _errors.py (ReconcilerError base; RetryExhaustedError(ReconcilerError, RuntimeError)); both retry loops chain the cause + carry last_exception/attempts.

SIDE-WORK (user-requested, not epic children):
- Added a venv-activation note to the LOCAL CLAUDE guidance (/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/CLAUDE.local.md): always `source .venv/bin/activate` first — the global ~/.local/bin/rebar is STALE (drops newer config keys, e.g. silently disables the plan-review claim gate; tell: prints "unknown key '…' ignored").
- STANDING RULE this session (user-directed): run a SUBAGENT CODE REVIEW before closing EACH ticket; remediate + re-run until it PASSES. Applied to all 5.

PARKED (user paused the session here, at a clean state):
- da53 self-waltz-ace: CLAIMED by joe + plan-review PASSED & SIGNED + advisory triage recorded; NO code written (working tree clean). It's a 385-LOC behavior-preserving extraction of _apply_batch's create/update/delete dispatch → a new apply_handlers.py. INTRICATE: handlers share mutable state (rest_calls counter, deferred_creates, events_list, mutations_with_outcomes, client) + soft-fail `continue` paths that print their OWN stderr RECON lines + the HeadDrift abort invariant. See the PARKED comment on the ticket for the full extraction plan. depends_on ff7d (now closed → unblocked).

REMAINING OPEN EPIC CHILDREN (all reconciler module-splits / test gaps):
- 1242 unfed-liner-arson (story): split outbound_differ.py (1545 LOC) at the comment-diff seam.
- 1dfc hush-quail-holm (story): decompose reconcile_once() into in-place phase helpers (reconcile.py 1315 LOC).
- 2220 foamy-gem-skip (story): close the last 10% of E2E config-matrix tests (F1/F2/F3).
(self-waltz da53 precedes none of these now; unfed/hush/foamy touch different files — outbound_differ.py / reconcile.py / tests — so no cross-conflict.)

RESUME RECIPE (per child):
1. `source .venv/bin/activate` (REQUIRED — global rebar is stale). Verify `which rebar` → .venv. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set for the gates.
2. Branch off the LATEST origin/main: `git fetch origin && git checkout -b <branch> origin/main` (the prior child branches DIVERGED via squash-merge — `git merge --ff-only` will NOT work; always branch fresh off origin/main).
3. `rebar review-plan <id>` (PASSES cleanly now — step-budget default is 50, no agentic-verifier flake). Set file_impact. Remediate/triage advisories. `rebar claim <id> --assignee joe`.
4. Implement carefully (preserve behavior; module-splits must keep imports + invariants). `make check` (ruff+mypy) + the targeted test suite.
5. SUBAGENT CODE REVIEW (standing rule) → remediate → re-run until PASS.
6. Commit (pre-commit hook runs make lint+typecheck), push, `gh pr create`, `gh pr merge <n> --auto --squash`. CI ~12-13 min.
7. After the PR merges: `git fetch origin`, branch off / reset working tree to the merged origin/main (the completion verifier grounds against the WORKING TREE — the child's merged code MUST be present), then `rebar transition <id> in_progress closed` (completion verifier; stories need their code present).

GOTCHAS:
- Completion verifier reads the WORKING TREE (not just origin/main) — close from a tree that has the merged child code (the trick used all session: create the NEXT child's branch off fresh origin/main, which stages the merged code, then close the just-merged ticket).
- The module-size structural test (tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py, from drag-gripe-brake) asserts .github/module-size-allowlist.txt == the computed over-cap set EXACTLY. Any module-split that drops a file below 800 LOC MUST remove it from the allowlist (and update docs/architecture.md's offenders row), or the test fails.
- The .joe-janitor/ working-tree changes are pre-existing local artifacts — do NOT commit them.
